title: Fantastic Crunchy Peruvian Polish Sausage Anticuchos
description: A salty and crunchy Peruvian dish featuring Polish sausage, this recipe is a nostalgic treat that is nut-free friendly and perfect for snacking. The shio-cure adds a depth of flavor to the dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together shio cure, lime juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the sliced Polish sausage to the marinade and toss to coat evenly.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated sausage pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the anticuchos for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they are crispy and golden brown.
Serve the anticuchos hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
